'''zhogawaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:hubristic|hubristic]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| zh-g-w
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:hubristic|hubristic]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| zhogawaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:zhogawithi|zhogawithi]] || [[word:zhogawiji|zhogawiji]] || [[word:zhogawishi|zhogawishi]] || [[word:zhogawiki|zhogawiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:zhogawuthuthu|zhogawuthuthu]] || [[word:zhogawujuju|zhogawujuju]] || [[word:zhogawushushu|zhogawushushu]] || [[word:zhogawukuku|zhogawukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:zhogawuthu|zhogawuthu]] || [[word:zhogawuju|zhogawuju]] || [[word:zhogawushu|zhogawushu]] || [[word:zhogawuku|zhogawuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:zhogawufthuf|zhogawufthuf]] || [[word:zhogawufjuf|zhogawufjuf]] || [[word:zhogawufshuf|zhogawufshuf]] || [[word:zhogawufkuf|zhogawufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:zhogawethe|zhogawethe]] || [[word:zhogaweje|zhogaweje]] || [[word:zhogaweshe|zhogaweshe]] || [[word:zhogaweke|zhogaweke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:zhogawothotho|zhogawothotho]] || [[word:zhogawojojo|zhogawojojo]] || [[word:zhogawoshosho|zhogawoshosho]] || [[word:zhogawokoko|zhogawokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:zhogawotho|zhogawotho]] || [[word:zhogawojo|zhogawojo]] || [[word:zhogawosho|zhogawosho]] || [[word:zhogawoko|zhogawoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:zhogawofthof|zhogawofthof]] || [[word:zhogawofjof|zhogawofjof]] || [[word:zhogawofshof|zhogawofshof]] || [[word:zhogawofkof|zhogawofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:zhogawĂŻfthĂŻf|zhogawĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:zhogawĂŻfjĂŻf|zhogawĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:zhogawĂŻfshĂŻf|zhogawĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:zhogawĂŻfkĂŻf|zhogawĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:zhogawĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf|zhogawĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:zhogawĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf|zhogawĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:zhogawĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf|zhogawĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:zhogawĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf|zhogawĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:zhogawĂŻfthĂŻf|zhogawĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:zhogawĂŻfjĂŻf|zhogawĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:zhogawĂŻfshĂŻf|zhogawĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:zhogawĂŻfkĂŻf|zhogawĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:zhogawĂŻfthĂŻf|zhogawĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:zhogawĂŻfjĂŻf|zhogawĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:zhogawĂŻfshĂŻf|zhogawĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:zhogawĂŻfkĂŻf|zhogawĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:zhogawĂŠthĂŠ|zhogawĂŠthĂŠ]] || [[word:zhogawĂŠjĂŠ|zhogawĂŠjĂŠ]] || [[word:zhogawĂŠshĂŠ|zhogawĂŠshĂŠ]] || [[word:zhogawĂŠkĂŠ|zhogawĂŠkĂŠ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:zhogawathatha|zhogawathatha]] || [[word:zhogawajaja|zhogawajaja]] || [[word:zhogawashasha|zhogawashasha]] || [[word:zhogawakaka|zhogawakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:zhogawatha|zhogawatha]] || [[word:zhogawaja|zhogawaja]] || [[word:zhogawasha|zhogawasha]] || [[word:zhogawaka|zhogawaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:zhogawafthaf|zhogawafthaf]] || [[word:zhogawafjaf|zhogawafjaf]] || [[word:zhogawafshaf|zhogawafshaf]] || [[word:zhogawafkaf|zhogawafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:zhogawasha|zhogawasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:zhogawshĂ«sha|zhogawshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:zhogawrosha|zhogawrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:zhogawmusha|zhogawmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:zhogawyasha|zhogawyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gozhogawnkshĂ«sha|gozhogawnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gozhogawnkrosha|gozhogawnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gozhogawnkmusha|gozhogawnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gozhogawnkyasha|gozhogawnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:zhogagawasha|zhogagawasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:zhogagawshĂ«sha|zhogagawshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:zhogagawrosha|zhogagawrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:zhogagawmusha|zhogagawmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:zhogagawyasha|zhogagawyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gozhogagawnkshĂ«sha|gozhogagawnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gozhogagawnkrosha|gozhogagawnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gozhogagawnkmusha|gozhogagawnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gozhogagawnkyasha|gozhogagawnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:zhegĂŠwasha|zhegĂŠwasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:zhegĂŠwshĂ«sha|zhegĂŠwshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:zhegĂŠwrosha|zhegĂŠwrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:zhegĂŠwmusha|zhegĂŠwmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:zhegĂŠwyasha|zhegĂŠwyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gozhegĂŠwnkshĂ«sha|gozhegĂŠwnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gozhegĂŠwnkrosha|gozhegĂŠwnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gozhegĂŠwnkmusha|gozhegĂŠwnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gozhegĂŠwnkyasha|gozhegĂŠwnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:zhogfawasha|zhogfawasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:zhogfawshĂ«sha|zhogfawshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:zhogfawrosha|zhogfawrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:zhogfawmusha|zhogfawmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:zhogfawyasha|zhogfawyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gozhogfawnkshĂ«sha|gozhogfawnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gozhogfawnkrosha|gozhogfawnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gozhogfawnkmusha|gozhogfawnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gozhogfawnkyasha|gozhogfawnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki adjectives]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|88d00a5}}
